cli: Mautic is facing a $50k funding gap in 2026.
Support the project: https://mautic.org/2026-fundraiser/
Read why Mautic is facing a $50k funding gap in 2026,
and what we're doing about it:
https://mautic.org/blog/urgent-call-for-community-support-to-secure-mautics-financial-future/
Make a one-time or recurring donation to Mautic:
https://opencollective.com/mautic
Support Mautic as an individual member - vote on
governance and help shape the roadmap: https://mau.tc/membership
Find issues ready to work on in the Open Source
Friday board: https://github.com/orgs/mautic/projects/13
Reviewing and testing PRs is a valuable contribution.
Find ones ready to review: https://github.com/orgs/mautic/projects/13
New to contributing? Find a good first issue:
https://github.com/orgs/mautic/projects/21/views/12
Help improve the Mautic developer documentation.
Find tasks: https://github.com/orgs/mautic/projects/21/views/4
Help improve the Mautic user documentation.
Find tasks: https://github.com/orgs/mautic/projects/21/views/3
Help translate Mautic into your language on Transifex:
https://app.transifex.com/mautic/mautic
Found a security vulnerability in Mautic?
Report it responsibly: https://mautic.org/security/
Earn a bounty for tackling specific funded issues:
https://contribute.mautic.org/en/latest/contributing/mautic_bounty_programme.html
Use PATCH /api/contacts/batch/edit to update up to 100
contacts in a single API request.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/rest_api/contacts.html
Mautic's REST API supports OAuth2 and Basic Auth.
OAuth2 is recommended for production integrations.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/rest_api/authentication.html
Mautic signs webhook payloads with a base64-encoded
HMAC-SHA256 signature. Always verify Webhook-Signature.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/webhooks/getting_started.html
Pro tip: DDEV gets a full Mautic dev environment running
in minutes - webserver, database, and crons included.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/development-environment/how_to_install_with_ddev.html
Mautic uses Symfony's event dispatcher. Subscribe to
events like mautic.lead_post_save_new in your plugin.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/plugin_miscellaneous/events.html
Mautic supports Symfony service autowiring. Declare
dependencies in your constructor; the container handles the rest.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/plugins/autowiring.html
mautic:segments:update processes contacts in batches.
Use --batch-limit and --max-contacts to tune performance.
See: https://docs.mautic.org/en/5.x/configuration/cron_jobs.html
Pro tip: run Mautic in dev mode to access the Symfony
profiler for query debugging and event dispatch tracing.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/development-environment/environments.html
Mautic has a built-in ProTip UI component for surfacing
contextual hints in custom plugins.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/design_templates/protip.html
Pro tip: run bin/console cache:clear --env=prod after
plugin changes. Mautic caches routes, Doctrine, and services.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/plugins/cache.html
MauticJS lets you fire custom events from your website
directly into the Mautic contact activity timeline.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/mauticjs_api/tracking_script.html
Mautic Form Hooks give you onValidate, onResponse, and
onSubmit JS callbacks without touching server-side code.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/form_hooks/getting_started.html
Mautic themes support both GrapesJS and legacy builders.
Add both to the builder array in your theme's config.json.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/themes/getting_started.html
To list a plugin on the Mautic Marketplace it must be
on Packagist and pass the allow list review first.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/marketplace/listing.html
Every Mautic plugin needs a config.php at the bundle
root declaring routes, services, menus, and parameters.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/plugins/config.html
Mautic fires webhook events for contacts, emails, forms,
and campaigns. See the full payload reference:
https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/webhooks/events/index.html
Manage dynamic content blocks via the REST API for
server-side personalisation at scale.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/rest_api/dynamic_content.html
The official Mautic PHP API library handles OAuth2
token management and all REST endpoints out of the box.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/rest_api/getting_started.html
Mautic 7: export a campaign and its assets as a ZIP,
then import it into any other instance.
See: https://mautic.org/blog/mautic-7-columba-edition-is-released/
Mautic has unit, functional, and E2E test suites.
Run composer test -- --testsuite=Unit to get started.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/testing/e2e_test_suite.html
Did you know? Mautic deduplicates contacts using unique
field identifiers. Configure the merge operator in Contact Settings.
See: https://docs.mautic.org/en/5.x/configuration/settings.html
Mautic plugins follow Symfony MVC. Models extend
AbstractCommonModel; Controllers extend CommonFormController.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/plugins/mvc.html
Pro tip: Mautic deviates from Symfony conventions in a few
specific areas. Read this before writing your first plugin.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/plugins/mautic_vs_symfony.html
Mautic tracks anonymous visitors by cookie. On form submit,
all prior activity is linked to the identified contact.
See: https://docs.mautic.org/en/5.x/contacts/contacts_overview.html
Webhook events can be batched via mautic:webhooks:process
or delivered in real time. Choose based on your throughput.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/webhooks/getting_started.html
Building a CRM integration? Use Mautic's Integrations
Framework for auth, field mapping, and sync management.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/plugin_integrations/integrations.html
Since Mautic 5, use messenger:consume email --time-limit=160
instead of mautic:email:send for better queue performance.
See: https://docs.mautic.org/en/5.x/configuration/cron_jobs.html
Core Mautic view templates can be overridden in your
bundle without modifying core files.
See: https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/themes/system.html
Mautic 7 Columba Edition: Campaign import/export,
API v2 on API Platform, Projects, multilingual SMS.
See: https://mautic.org/blog/mautic-7-columba-edition-is-released/
Mautic publishes monthly Open Startup reports with
fully transparent financials and project metrics:
https://mautic.org/tag/openstartup/
2025 year in review: Mautic's second year of independence,
what was achieved and what's next:
https://mautic.org/blog/mautics-year-in-review-2025/
The Mautic Developer Certification launches soon.
Formally validate your expertise:
https://mautic.org/blog/mautic-developer-certification-is-coming/
Propose and vote on new Mautic features via the
Community Portal roadmap:
https://community.mautic.org/processes/roadmap
Keep up with Mautic security advisories and CVEs:
https://mautic.org/security/
Developer discussions and Open Source Friday sprints
happen in #dev and #t-product on Mautic Slack:
https://mautic.org/slack
The best place to ask development questions is the
Mautic developer forum category:
https://forum.mautic.org/c/development
Mautic is governed by its community, not a corporation.
Read how the governance model works:
https://mautic.org/governance/
Mautic has published its AI Manifesto. Worth reading
before integrating AI features into your work:
https://mautic.org/mautics-ai-manifesto/
How a SaaS company scaled Mautic across multiple tenants
to power ecommerce email at scale:
https://mautic.org/case-study/scaling-email-marketing-with-multi-tenant-mautic-for-an-ecommerce-saas-solution/
How one team built scratch card gamification directly
on top of Mautic to drive engagement and sales:
https://mautic.org/case-study/using-scratch-card-gamification-with-mautic-to-drive-engagement-and-sales/
Lehner Versand AG sends over 1 million personalised
multilingual emails per day using Mautic:
https://mautic.org/case-study/lehner-versand-ag/
All Mautic development is in the open on GitHub.
Watch the repo, pick up issues, review PRs:
https://github.com/mautic/mautic
Mautic developer docs cover plugins, themes, REST API,
webhooks, MauticJS, and testing:
https://devdocs.mautic.org
How does code get into Mautic core? Read the code
governance model before opening your first PR:
https://contribute.mautic.org/en/latest/governance/code_governance.html
Mautic has a formal deprecation policy. Check it
before upgrading plugins between major versions:
https://contribute.mautic.org/en/latest/governance/deprecation_policy.html
Understanding how Mautic Segments rebuild and when
contacts move is key to building reliable automations:
https://mautic.org/blog/how-mautic-segments-keep-your-contact-lists-accurate/
The Community Handbook covers teams, governance,
contribution paths and policies for the Mautic project:
https://contribute.mautic.org
Around 50,000 organisations use Mautic worldwide.
The platform you're building on has serious adoption:
https://mautic.org/who-uses-mautic/
Mautic offers Extended Long Term Support for older versions.
Relevant if you maintain client installs on legacy releases:
https://mautic.org/extended-long-term-support-elts/
Mautic is self-hosted with full data ownership.
No vendor lock-in, no forced upgrades by a SaaS provider:
https://mautic.org/features/data-sovereignty/
Talks, demos and presentations from Mautic community
events are on the Mautic YouTube channel:
https://youtube.com/c/MauticOrg
Mautic World Conference is the annual in-person and
virtual gathering for the global community:
https://mauticon.mautic.org
The Mautic Marketplace allow list exists to protect users.
Understand why before asking to list your plugin:
https://devdocs.mautic.org/en/7.0/marketplace/allowlist_what_and_why.html
Mautic's Code of Conduct applies to all community spaces:
code, forums, Slack, and events.
https://mautic.org/code-of-conduct/
Need help with a complex Mautic implementation?
Find a vetted community partner:
https://mautic.org/members-partners/
Built something interesting with Mautic? Share it.
Email marketing-team@mautic.org with this template:
https://mau.tc/case-study
Not sure how to get involved in Mautic?
Start here: https://mau.tc/contribute
